meaning: n.[史]底比斯(古希腊Boeotia的主要城邦)
examples: His uncle Shabaka had established a Nubian presence in Memphis and Thebes.
Mummy of Hornedjitef (third century BC). A wooden coffin from Thebes, Egypt.
Weeks mentioned his plan to make a 3-D map of ancient Thebes (Luxor today), and Ludwig's imagination was engaged.
